title: get_blocking doc: summary sentence stranded inside # Panics section
description: What is unclear and for whom: the sentence 'Call `store.get(name)` from a synchronous context.' appears at line 588, immediately after the # Panics body text. It reads as if it is a continuation of 'Panics only if ... Call store.get(name) from a synchronous context.' which is grammatically incoherent. A contributor reading the doc comment will be confused about what 'Call ...' is trying to say. What would make it clear: move that sentence to be the opening summary line of the doc comment, before # Panics. The doc comment should open with a one-sentence summary of what the function does, per rustdoc convention.
